Northlands Bustani

Service Above Self

District 9212  ·  Chartered 23 March 2026

Join Our ClubLearn More
About Rotary

A Global Force for Good

Founded in 1905, Rotary International is one of the world’s largest humanitarian service organisations, with more than 1.4 million members across 46,000 clubs in over 200 countries.

Rotary clubs bring together established professionals and community leaders committed to lifelong service. Unlike Rotaract clubs (for young adults 18+), Rotary is an enduring professional commitment with no upper age limit.

Club ServiceCommunity ServiceInternational ServiceVocational Service
Northlands Bustani

Rooted in Community.
Growing Together.

The Rotary Club of Northlands Bustani brings together professionals from Northlands and the surrounding communities of Kenya, united by a commitment to service, fellowship, and enduring impact.

We began as a satellite club under the Rotary Club of Juja in July 2025, growing rapidly into a community of 56 dedicated professionals. In September 2025 we adopted the name "Bustani" and set our sights on full charter — achieving it on 23 March 2026. From our first meeting to our first medical camp serving over 600 people, we have been cultivating a garden of change — one project, one partnership, one member at a time.

“Bustani — a garden, a place of cultivation and growth.”

Bustani (boo-STAH-nee) — Swahili, from Arabic بُسْتَان

“Ubuntu — I am because we are.”

Ubuntu (oo-BOON-too) — Nguni Bantu philosophy of shared humanity

Charter Members

56

Chartered

March 2026

District

9212

Country

Kenya

Our Members — Northlands Bustani

Become a MemberOur Story
Our Story

From Vision to Charter

July 2025

The Seed is Planted

A group of committed professionals begins gathering in Northlands under the wing of the Rotary Club of Juja, operating as a satellite club. Weekly meetings at Bedarin Hotel, Bypass take shape — building fellowship, exploring Rotary's values, and laying the groundwork for something enduring.

September 2025

We Become Bustani

Membership grows rapidly. The group adopts the name "Bustani" — Swahili for garden — capturing the vision of cultivation and growth at the heart of the club. The decision is made to pursue full independent charter status.

December 2025

Service Begins

With 56 active members, the club launches its first major service projects: the Gachororo Community Medical Camp (600+ people served) and the YoungLife Africa Early Christmas Visit. The club demonstrates it is ready to charter.

23 March 2026

Charter DayOfficial

The Rotary Club of Northlands Bustani is officially chartered by Rotary International, sponsored by the Rotary Club of Juja. A historic milestone for our 56 members, our families, and every community we will serve.

Chartered by

Rotary Club of Juja

District 9212 — a club distinguished by its commitment to environmental stewardship and community impact across Kenya.

What We Do

Four Avenues of Service

Club Service

Nurturing the fellowship and operational strength of our club — so that we remain a vibrant, effective vehicle for service in every season.

Community Service

Hands-on engagement in Northlands and beyond — addressing local needs through sustainable projects that create measurable, lasting change.

International Service

Connecting with the global Rotary family to support humanitarian initiatives that transcend borders and reflect our shared humanity.

Vocational Service

Upholding the highest standards of ethics and excellence in our professional lives — using our skills as a platform for meaningful service.

Our Rotary Family

Connected Across Communities

Rotary Club
Our Chartering Club

Rotary Club of Juja

The club that believed in us from the beginning. The Rotary Club of Juja sponsored our charter and welcomed us into the global Rotary family. Known for their environmental stewardship and community service across District 9212.

Rotaract Club
Sister Club

Rotaract Club of Youth Connect Kenya

A vibrant Rotaract club (for young adults 18+) that shares our values and geography. Rotaract clubs partner with Rotary clubs, bridging emerging youth leadership with established professional service.

Rotary Club
Sister Club

Rotary Club of Mukurweini

A fellow Rotary Club in our network — professional adult members committed to the same Four Avenues of Service, united by the bonds of District 9212 fellowship.

Note: Rotaract clubs are for young adults (18+) and became an independent membership type in 2020. Rotary clubs are open to established professionals with no upper age limit. The two membership types are distinct yet complementary — together spanning generations of service.

Weekly Meeting

We Meet Every Week

Day

Every Thursday

Time

7:00 PM

Venue

Bedarin Hotel, Bypass

Full schedule →
Membership

Shape the Future of Northlands

Rotary membership is an invitation to something greater than yourself — a lifelong commitment to professional excellence, authentic fellowship, and service that endures.

We are guided by two African philosophies that speak to who we are: Bustani — a garden cultivated with intention — and Ubuntu — the understanding that we rise together, because none of us flourishes alone.

We welcome established professionals who are ready to invest their skills, networks, and passion into building a better community — one project at a time.

Apply for Membership
Contact Us

Service Above Self

A professional service organisation rooted in Northlands, Kenya. Guided by Bustani and Ubuntu. Part of Rotary International District 9212.
